1. Module overview

ModuleDocument Control
Pharma purposeAuthor, review, approve, publish, supersede and withdraw controlled documents (SOPs, work instructions, policies, specifications, protocols, report templates, guidelines).
Compliance basisISO 9001:2015 §7.5 (documented information) · 21 CFR 211.180 (records & reports) · 21 CFR Part 11 (e-signatures on approved docs) · EU GMP Chapter 4
Hawkeye routes/document-control (frontend) · /api/document-control (backend)
Hawkeye model filebackend/src/models/DocumentControlModel.js
Tenant module flagmodules.DOCUMENT_CONTROL

Documents move through DRAFT → UNDER_REVIEW (multi-step serial approval) → APPROVED → EFFECTIVE → SUPERSEDED or WITHDRAWN. Each approval step can be assigned to a role (e.g. 'QA Manager') and optionally to a specific user. Publishing an SOP with requiresTrainingOnUpdate=true fires the AI training auto-assign agent so affected roles get fresh 'read-and-understood' training records automatically.

2. Standard pharma EQMS vs Hawkeye — gap analysis

Each row is a capability a pharma QA team would expect from an EQMS deviation module. Hawkeye column shows what's actually shipped. MET = parity, PARTIAL = ships but with caveats, GAP = not implemented yet.

Pharma expectationHawkeye implementationStatusNote
DRAFT → UNDER_REVIEW → APPROVED → EFFECTIVE state machine
ISO 9001 §7.5.3		 6-state enum: DRAFT / UNDER_REVIEW / APPROVED / EFFECTIVE / SUPERSEDED / WITHDRAWN. State transitions via /submit-for-review, /approve, /publish, /supersede, /withdraw. MET
Multi-step serial approval (each reviewer must approve before next)
21 CFR 211.100(b)		 approvalSteps[] array on the model. /approve advances by stepOrder; document moves to APPROVED only when all steps APPROVED/DELEGATED. Rejection at any step reverts to DRAFT. MET
Document number auto-generation + version tracking
21 CFR 211.180		 documentNumber set by user; versionMajor + versionMinor tracked; versionLabel computed. /supersede auto-increments versionMajor + creates new revision linked via supersededById. MET
8 document types (SOP / WORK_INSTRUCTION / POLICY / SPECIFICATION / PROTOCOL / REPORT_TEMPLATE / FORM / GUIDELINE)
EU GMP Chapter 4		 documentType enum with all 8 types. MET
Publish triggers training assignment to affected roles
21 CFR 211.25 (training)		 On /publish, if requiresTrainingOnUpdate=true, triggerTrainingOnDocumentRevision() fires the Wave 2 AI auto-assign agent → creates training-records for affected roles. MET
Effective date + retirement date + review-period months
ISO 9001 §7.5.3		 effectiveDate, retirementDate, reviewPeriodMonths (default 24) on the model. MET
Withdraw with reason capture
21 CFR 211.180(c)		 /withdraw requires withdrawalReason; status flips to WITHDRAWN. MET
21 CFR Part 11 e-signature on approval
21 CFR Part 11 §11.50		 approvalSteps[].signature field exists; generic /api/electronic-signatures/sign endpoint can be wired but is NOT enforced today. PARTIAL Wire e-sig requirement on each approval step
Document classification (Public / Internal / Confidential / Restricted)
ISO 27001 / GxP		 complianceStandards[] field; no formal classification taxonomy yet. GAP Add classification enum + access-control hook
Periodic review reminder when reviewPeriodMonths elapses
ISO 9001 §7.5.3.2		 Field exists; no scheduler / notification yet. GAP Add cron job + notificationOutbox entry when next-review-date is within 30 days
Storage of document binary (PDF, DOCX) with content-hash integrity
21 CFR Part 11 §11.10(c)		 storageRef (S3 path) + digilockerId fields. Content hash captured on upload via dataIntegrityLog. MET

3. Personas + role mapping

Login password for every persona: EqmsDemo@2026. Roles drive which API endpoints respond — see Hawkeye roleMiddleware.permit().

PersonaEmailResponsibilities in this moduleLifecycle states they touch
Sarah O'Brien
Doc Control (admin)		 doc.control@novex-pharma.demo Authors + maintains all controlled documents, drives them through approval, publishes, retires. DRAFT UNDER_REVIEW APPROVED EFFECTIVE SUPERSEDED WITHDRAWN
James Thompson
Head of QA (admin · approver)		 qa.head@novex-pharma.demo Default approver on QA-owned SOPs. UNDER_REVIEW
Marcus Brown
Regulatory Affairs (admin · approver)		 regulatory@novex-pharma.demo Approver on regulatory-impact documents. UNDER_REVIEW
Elena Vasquez
VP Quality (tenant_admin)		 vp.quality@novex-pharma.demo Final approval on policy-level documents. UNDER_REVIEW APPROVED
Rebecca Kim
Training Coordinator		 training.coord@novex-pharma.demo Receives training auto-assign notifications when SOPs publish. EFFECTIVE (downstream)

4. Feature catalogue (click-by-click)

4.1 Document register

What it doesList all documents in the tenant with status chip + 'Submit for Review' / 'Withdraw' inline buttons.
Menu / route/document-control
Available to rolesany tenant viewer
Backend APIGET /api/document-control

Click-by-click

  1. NAVIGATE Click 'Documents' in the top nav
    → Page renders with rows
  2. WAIT Spinner clears
    → 4 seeded SOPs visible: SOP-QC-014 EFFECTIVE, SOP-MB-003 EFFECTIVE, SOP-PROD-041 UNDER_REVIEW, WI-ENG-021 DRAFT

4.2 + New Document dialog

What it doesAuthor a new document. Captures number, title, type, version, description, and the requiresTrainingOnUpdate flag.
Menu / route/document-control · top-right '+ New Document' button
Available to rolesdoc admin
Backend APIPOST /api/document-control

Click-by-click

  1. CLICK Click '+ New Document'
    → Dialog opens
  2. TYPE Fill documentNumber (e.g. SOP-QC-015)
    → user-defined
  3. TYPE Fill title
    → required
  4. CLICK Pick documentType (SOP / POLICY / WI / SPEC / PROTOCOL / REPORT_TEMPLATE / FORM / GUIDELINE)
    → default SOP
  5. TYPE Fill version (e.g. 1.0) + description
    → version maps to versionMajor.versionMinor
  6. CLICK Toggle requiresTrainingOnUpdate
    → If on, publish will fire training auto-assign
  7. CLICK Click 'Save'
    → Row appears with status DRAFT

Fields captured

FieldRequiredValidation / valuesNotes
documentNumber Yes string user-defined; should follow tenant convention
title Yes string
documentType No SOP | WORK_INSTRUCTION | POLICY | SPECIFICATION | PROTOCOL | REPORT_TEMPLATE | FORM | GUIDELINE default SOP
version No string e.g. '1.0' split into versionMajor.versionMinor at save
requiresTrainingOnUpdate No boolean default false

4.3 Submit for review

What it doesMove DRAFT → UNDER_REVIEW. Specify reviewers as a serial workflow.
Menu / routeDocument row (status=DRAFT) · 'Submit for Review' button
Available to rolesdoc admin · author
Backend APIPOST /api/document-control/:id/submit-for-review

Click-by-click

  1. CLICK Click 'Submit for Review' on a DRAFT row
    → Drawer with reviewers picker
  2. CLICK Add reviewer 1 — pick role (default 'QA Manager') + optional userId
    → stepOrder=1
  3. CLICK (Optional) Add more reviewers — they approve in order
    → stepOrder N
  4. CLICK Click 'Submit'
    → Status flips to UNDER_REVIEW; approvalSteps[] populated; first reviewer notified

4.4 Approve / reject step

What it doesReviewer for the current pending step approves, rejects, or delegates.
Menu / routeDocument row (status=UNDER_REVIEW) · 'Approve / Reject' button
Available to rolesany reviewer assigned to a step
Backend APIPOST /api/document-control/:id/approve

Click-by-click

  1. CLICK Click 'Approve / Reject'
    → Drawer with current step + comments + decision picker
  2. CLICK Pick decision (APPROVED / REJECTED / DELEGATED)
    → DELEGATED requires a userId of the new approver
  3. TYPE Fill comments (recommended)
    → stored on the step
  4. CLICK Click 'Submit decision'
    → Step updated; if all steps APPROVED → status=APPROVED; if any REJECTED → status=DRAFT

4.5 Publish

What it doesMake the APPROVED document effective. Fires AI training auto-assign if requiresTrainingOnUpdate=true.
Menu / routeDocument row (status=APPROVED) · 'Publish' button
Available to rolesdoc admin
Backend APIPOST /api/document-control/:id/publish
AI assistanceAI Wave 2 Training Auto-Assign Agent fires here when requiresTrainingOnUpdate=true

Click-by-click

  1. CLICK Click 'Publish'
    → Confirmation with effectiveDate picker (default today)
  2. CLICK (Optional) Pick a future effectiveDate
    → stored
  3. CLICK Click 'Confirm'
    → Status flips to EFFECTIVE; effectiveDate set; if requiresTrainingOnUpdate=true, training records created for affected roles

4.6 Supersede

What it doesReplace the EFFECTIVE document with a new revision (v2). Old version flips to SUPERSEDED.
Menu / routeDocument row (status=EFFECTIVE) · 'Supersede' button
Available to rolesdoc admin
Backend APIPOST /api/document-control/:id/supersede

Click-by-click

  1. CLICK Click 'Supersede'
    → Drawer pre-fills new revision (versionMajor + 1)
  2. TYPE Edit description / scope / etc. for the new revision
    → all fields editable
  3. CLICK Click 'Create new revision'
    → New row created in DRAFT (with supersedesId pointing to old); old row status=SUPERSEDED

4.7 Withdraw

What it doesTake an EFFECTIVE document out of service permanently.
Menu / routeDocument row (status=EFFECTIVE) · 'Withdraw' button
Available to rolesdoc admin
Backend APIPOST /api/document-control/:id/withdraw

Click-by-click

  1. CLICK Click 'Withdraw'
    → Drawer with withdrawalReason field
  2. TYPE Fill withdrawalReason (required)
    → required
  3. CLICK Click 'Confirm withdrawal'
    → Status flips to WITHDRAWN; cannot be reverted (must create new doc)

4.8 (downstream) Training auto-assign

What it doesFires automatically when an SOP with requiresTrainingOnUpdate=true is published. Identifies affected roles + creates 'read-and-understood' training records.
Menu / routeTriggered by /publish — visible in /training register
Available to rolesany tenant user (auto-fired by system)
Backend APIPOST /api/ai/training/auto-assign (internal hook)
AI assistanceAI Wave 2 AI agent — generates an optional knowledge-check question per affected role

Click-by-click

  1. WAIT After publish, wait ~5 s
    → training-records inserted for users in affectedRoles
  2. NAVIGATE Open /training
    → New ASSIGNED rows for the new SOP version

5. Full lifecycle walkthrough — one transaction, end-to-end

One SOP walked from initial author through publish to withdrawal. Persona = Sarah (doc.control).

# Persona State transition Action API Observed Result
1 Sarah
Doc Control		 — → DRAFT Click '+ New Document' → fill SOP-E2E-NNN / cleaning verification SOP / SOP / 1.0 → Save POST /api/document-control Row visible at top; status=DRAFT PASS
Expected DB state after this step:
document-controls { _id, documentNumber: 'SOP-E2E-NNN', title, documentType: 'SOP', versionMajor: 1, versionMinor: 0, status: 'DRAFT', createdBy: sarah._id, requiresTrainingOnUpdate: false }
2 Sarah
Doc Control		 DRAFT → UNDER_REVIEW Click 'Submit for Review' → add reviewer 1 (QA Manager · sarah._id) → Submit POST /api/document-control/:id/submit-for-review approvalSteps[] populated; status=UNDER_REVIEW PASS
Expected DB state after this step:
document-controls { status: 'UNDER_REVIEW', approvalSteps: [{ stepOrder: 1, role: 'QA Manager', approverId: sarah._id, decision: 'PENDING' }] }
3 Sarah (also approver here)
QA Manager		 UNDER_REVIEW → APPROVED Click 'Approve / Reject' on the row → decision=APPROVED → Submit POST /api/document-control/:id/approve Step decision recorded; all steps APPROVED → status=APPROVED PASS
Expected DB state after this step:
approvalSteps[0] = { decision: 'APPROVED', decidedAt, comments }; status: 'APPROVED'
4 Sarah
Doc Control		 APPROVED → EFFECTIVE Click 'Publish' → confirm with effectiveDate=today POST /api/document-control/:id/publish status=EFFECTIVE; effectiveDate set PASS
Expected DB state after this step:
document-controls { status: 'EFFECTIVE', effectiveDate: <today> }
(if requiresTrainingOnUpdate) training-records: N rows ASSIGNED to affected role users
5 Sarah
Doc Control		 EFFECTIVE → WITHDRAWN Click 'Withdraw' → fill withdrawalReason → Confirm POST /api/document-control/:id/withdraw status=WITHDRAWN; withdrawalReason captured PASS
Expected DB state after this step:
document-controls { status: 'WITHDRAWN', withdrawalReason }

6. AI assistance map

Each AI assist is a separate endpoint. Outputs flow through the grounded-generation runtime (citation gate, confidence floor, schema validation, accept/reject audit trail).

AI agentAttached to state(s)EndpointWhere in UIWhat it returnsProvider
Training Auto-Assign Agent (Wave 2) EFFECTIVE (publish hook) POST /api/ai/training/auto-assign Auto-fired on publish if requiresTrainingOnUpdate=true Identifies affected roles + creates training-records + (optionally) drafts an LLM knowledge-check question Free Gemini for question draft; rule-engine for role mapping
(roadmap) AI redline / change summary any (when superseding) (future) Supersede drawer · 'Summarise changes from prior rev' Diff old + new doc text → LLM-summarised what-changed bullets for the approval drawer Free Gemini

7. Regulator-trace matrix

For each lifecycle state, the specific clauses + evidence Hawkeye captures so an inspector can audit the record. Maps to FDA / ISO / ICH / EU GMP source clauses.

StateCited clausesEvidence capturedBacking records
DRAFT ISO 9001 §7.5.3 documentNumber + title + type + version + author document-controls
UNDER_REVIEW 21 CFR 211.100(b)
ISO 9001 §7.5.3.2		 approvalSteps[] with role + assignee + status document-controls.approvalSteps
APPROVED 21 CFR Part 11 §11.50 Each step's decision + decisionAt + comments + (signature) document-controls.approvalSteps + dataIntegrityLog (when e-sig wired)
EFFECTIVE ISO 9001 §7.5.3.1
EU GMP Chapter 4		 effectiveDate + reviewPeriodMonths + storageRef (S3 binary) document-controls
SUPERSEDED 21 CFR 211.180(c) supersededById link to new revision; old version retained read-only document-controls (both rows)
WITHDRAWN 21 CFR 211.180(c) withdrawalReason + withdrawnAt + withdrawnBy document-controls

8. Test results matrix

SuiteScopeResultEvidence
eqms-lifecycle.spec.ts · doc DRAFT → UNDER_REVIEW → APPROVED → EFFECTIVE → WITHDRAWN PASS 6/6 PASS · eqms-test-results-v2.pdf
eqms-cross-module.spec.ts · F2 Document publish + AI training auto-assign PASS F2 steps 1-3 PASS; step 4 SKIP (auto-assign on serverless)
novex-walkthrough.spec.ts /document-control register UI render with seeded SOPs PASS doc-01-register.png

9. Known gaps + roadmap

  • Mandatory e-signature on approval steps — Wire /api/electronic-signatures/sign as a required step before /approve persists. Captures signer IP + auth method (PASSWORD / MFA / SSO). HIGH
  • Periodic review scheduler — Cron that scans for documents whose nextReview = effectiveDate + reviewPeriodMonths. Send reminder via notificationOutbox. Flag overdue. HIGH
  • AI redline / change summary on supersede — Diff old + new doc text → LLM bullets for approver drawer. MEDIUM
  • Document classification taxonomy — Add classification enum (PUBLIC / INTERNAL / CONFIDENTIAL / RESTRICTED) wired to access controls. MEDIUM
  • DigiLocker / eSign integration — digilockerId field exists; complete the upload + retrieval flow for tenants in India. LOW
